message:
beads(8n0rm): file 8n0rm.8 migration bead; 8n0rm.6 blocked pending caller migration

8n0rm.6's precondition check (audit for OPERATIONS-emitting callers)
surfaced production code in fcp-host + 10+ connectors still using the
legacy shape. Per the bead's own spec ("If real-issuer hits exist,
STOP + file a new bead for migration"), filed 8n0rm.8 with the full
call-site inventory and blocks 8n0rm.6 on it. arch-int also blocks
on 8n0rm.8 so the overall integration doesn't close prematurely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
